creator: theis@aon.at
text:
I submitted an update to http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=179528 :
I changed the default for sshd from /var/log/sshd.log to /var/log/auth.log
I will not change the installation behavior of fail2ban:
Changes to configuration files <name>.conf shall be made in files named 
<name>.local
At installation you'll get a message telling you to do so.

In my opinion this PR can be closed.


Best regards

Christoph
